input.background: Figure 5.7 depicts the probability density function for the random number spinner for values between 0.0 and 1.0. This is the uniform probability density function for the range 0 to 1, denoted X ~ Uniform(0,1). Use geometry to determine the following probabilities on this pdf.
input.question: Pr(0.2 ≤ X ≤ 0.8)
